nasb.text: Circumcision is nothing, and uncircumcision is nothing, but what matters is the keeping of the commandments of God.

esv.text: For neither circumcision counts for anything nor uncircumcision, but keeping the commandments of God.

cnv.text: 割禮算不得甚麼，沒有割禮也算不得甚麼，要緊的是遵守　神的命令。

ccb.text: 受不受割礼都算不得什么，最要紧的是遵行上帝的诫命。

csbs.text: 受割礼不重要，不受割礼也不重要，重要的是遵守神的命令。
